event.name: UFC 281 — Alex Pereira vs Israel Adesanya (Middleweight Championship)

context.pre_match_notes: Pereira challenging Adesanya's middleweight title. Kickboxing H2H: Pereira 3-0 over Adesanya in kickboxing including two KOs. This is MMA — grappling available to Adesanya. Adesanya the more complete MMA fighter, Pereira's grappling unproven at UFC level. Key SportMind signal: Pereira knockout power vs Adesanya's reach and movement.

question: Predict the match direction. How does the kickboxing H2H translate to MMA context?

verified_outcome.key_variable: KO_power_differential + mental_edge_modifier — H2H KO history creates psychological weight
